km.Yorkshire, England: យ៉ុរកស៊ីរe, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: Kent Holland於1330年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1376年享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Kent Holland于1330年出生在英国英格兰越可爾。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1376年享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Howland
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Kent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from the English county. This is probably named with a Celtic word meaning ‘border’. Use as a given name is of recent origin, but it is now quite popular. It may in part be seen as a short form of   Kenton .

en.lifeSummary: Kent Holland was born in 1330, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1376, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Kent Holland est né en 1330, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1376, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Kent Holland wurde 1330 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1376 im Alter von 46 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Kent Holland è nato il nel 1330 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1376, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Kent Hollandは1330年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1376年に46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Kent Holland(은)는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1376년 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Kent Holland nasceu em 1330, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1376, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Kent Holland родился в 1330 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1376 г. в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Kent Holland nació en 1330, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1376, a la edad de 46 años.
